// _comment: Add this entry into your existing `mcpServers` object in `~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json` (macOS) or `%APPDATA%/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json` (Windows). Replace `YOUR_USER_KEY_HERE` with the per-user API key from https://play.tournamental.com/account/keys. Omit the env block entirely for read-only public-tier access.
